reference_source: analytic ground truth for noiseless linear SCM; DoWhy backdoor.linear_regression recovers the same value when executed black-box against the pinned baseline

dowhy.command: uv run --with dowhy==0.14 --with numpy --with pandas python scripts/conformance/generate_dowhy_linear_gaussian_ate.py
dowhy.note: DoWhy not required in CI; re-run generator with pinned DoWhy to refresh black-box estimate field
